prompt:
Add language filtering to the media stack config to prevent non-English releases from being grabbed.

## Context
Sonarr v4 has language preferences in quality profiles. Currently the profiles don't restrict language, so Sonarr grabbed German-dubbed VVC releases of Andor S2.

## Requirements
Add to the media-stack-sync script (modules/media-server/recyclarr.nix) a step that sets the language to English on all Sonarr and Radarr quality profiles via the API. In Sonarr/Radarr v4 API, quality profiles have a 'language' field that can be set.

The approach should be:
1. For each quality profile, check if the language is already set to English
2. If not, update it to English via PUT to /api/v3/qualityprofile/{id}

The Sonarr v4 API language field on quality profiles looks like: {"id": 1, "name": "English"}

Also consider adding a TRaSH Guides custom format to recyclarr.yml if there's a standard one for penalizing non-English releases (check what's available).

Add this as a new section in the sync script, after the VVC rejection section. Include a comment explaining why.

Make sure nixfmt passes and the NixOS config evaluates.
